scripts.local:inboxes: zsh -lc 'set -a && source .env.local && set +a && node -e "fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/user_settings?select=user_id,email_inbox_address,preferred_language&order=created_at.asc`,{headers:{apikey:process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY,Authorization:`Bearer ${process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}`}}).then(async r=>{const data=await r.json(); if(!Array.isArray(data)){console.error(data); process.exit(1)} for (const row of data){console.log(`${row.user_id}  ${row.email_inbox_address}  ${row.preferred_language}`)}}).catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1)})"'
scripts.test:ingest-email: node -e "const port=process.env.PORT||'3002'; const inbox=process.env.TEST_INBOX_EMAIL||'bills.12345678@billflow.app'; const subject=process.env.TEST_EMAIL_SUBJECT||'Invoice test'; const text=process.env.TEST_EMAIL_TEXT||'Invoice from Acme Utilities. Amount due: 44.25 EUR. Due date: 2026-04-15. IBAN: BE52 0960 1178 4309. BIC: GKCCBEBB. Structured communication: +++260/2754/48343+++.'; fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}/api/ingest/email`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({to:inbox,from:'Acme Billing <billing@acme.example>',subject,text,html:''})}).then(async r=>{console.log(r.status); console.log(await r.text())}).catch(e=>{console.error(e); process.exit(1)})"
